privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real forensic test data downloaded from the DFTT project (NTFS File Recovery Test Image). The target case name is 'Litigation_Support_2024' with case number 'INV-EDISC-01', which explicitly match the instructions. The target disk image path is '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. The output export directory for Native files is explicitly expected at '/home/ga/Reports/eDiscovery/Natives' and the load file must be written to '/home/ga/Reports/eDiscovery/load_file.dat', which are verified by the export scripts and verifier.
